new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- prepare for UCEA announcement
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has initiated a kick-off for the non-clinical pay uplift project ahead of the main holiday season. Kevin needs to understand the scope, timeline, and HR Systems involvement required to support this national pay negotiation implementation.

new_tasks.title: DTP1334 SHSMS Evaluation -- review Christopher Sanders legal compliance requirements
new_tasks.description: Christopher Sanders has sent a follow-up from yesterday's session listing requirements relating to legal compliance and split into categories. Kevin needs to review and incorporate these into the evaluation weightings and POC work.
